programs.title: Code Black
programs.desc: The young girl Ariel bonded with a year ago when she lost her father, returns to Angels.

programs.title: My Reno Rules
programs.desc: After their first round of feedback and with more rooms this week to transform, the rival renovators are out to prove their worth. Ambitious plans push teams to the limit, while tempers flare.

programs.title: The Conners
programs.sub_title: A Kiss Is Just A Kiss
programs.desc: Darlene continues to struggle with deciding between David and Ben. Becky begins to doubt herself as a mom, and Mark gets in trouble at school when a picture of him and his boyfriend kissing goes viral. Meanwhile, Jackie continues to avoid her problems by keeping busy with everyone else's.

programs.title: The Conners
programs.desc: Harris is forced to confront Darlene about her lifestyle, while Jackie involves herself in other people's problems to avoid confronting her own. Meanwhile, Becky is overwhelmed by the costs of raising a baby, so her family steps in to help.

programs.title: Bondi Vet
programs.sub_title: Can This Cheetah Pass The Test?
programs.desc: A rescue kitten is struggling to walk since being microchipped and her family is worried it may have caused spinal damage. Will surgery restore Mitzi's ability to walk?

programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.sub_title: Your Deceased Mother Would Be Ashamed of You!/Clueless Tenant?!
programs.desc: An elderly woman attempts to collect money from the family of a deceased friend for a cruise they had planned to go on; a man is asked to leave his home by his landlord, but he tells the Judge he thinks his landlord is breaking the law.
